name: Pixel
description: Pixel is a sleepy cat with frequent bathroom habits. The current recovered game behavior is based on him: he often sleeps, often needs cleanup, and mostly lets the player interact when he has decided he wants something.
evidence: The recovered game already makes the cat sleepy because Pixel is sleepy.
The recovered game already makes the cat go to the bathroom frequently because Pixel does.
The intended cat model is interaction on the cat's terms, not always-available player commands.
notes: This profile preserves Pixel's sleepy and frequent-bathroom baseline while making boredom, anxiety, and wall scratching more occasional. The menu melody keeps the current Ode to Joy navigation sound for Pixel.
